one_time_description: Province of BC revenue of $37,498,320 in 2024 vs $3,548,196 in 2023 - likely a large one-time land or treaty-related transfer
economic_notes: Nation has extensive real estate development and natural resources GBEs including MST Development Corporation (Jericho and Fairmont lands), Takaya Developments, Inlailawatash LP, SPAL General Constructors, Salish Seas Fisheries, TWN Renewable Energy Holdings. GBE total assets $230M, long-term debt $146M. Olympic Legacy Trust invested at $32.6M fair value.
notes: Large spike in Province of BC revenue ($37.5M vs $3.5M prior year) likely a one-time land or treaty payment - driving the $47.9M surplus vs $5.9M prior year. Nation has extremely complex GBE structure with 63+ entities accounted for on modified equity basis, primarily real estate development (MST Jericho, Fairmont, LDB, Maplewood). GBE long-term debt of $146M not on Nation's balance sheet. Loans receivable grew from $57M to $99M primarily due to Tsleil-Waututh Land LP ($72M). Olympic Legacy Trust at $32.6M fair value. No schedule of remuneration provided in extracted text. Net financial assets $212M is very strong. CMHC mortgages $3.3M and BC Housing loan $1.3M comprise long-term debt on balance sheet.
